anti_patterns.title: Marketing hero inside a task surface
anti_patterns.do_not: Turn a working screen into a promotional hero when the user needs to inspect data or complete a task.

good_bad.good: A compact page title, current status, and task controls lead the work area.
good_bad.bad: A marked marketing hero precedes the user's live workspace.

anti_patterns.title: Status conveyed only by color
anti_patterns.do_not: Rely on a color change alone for errors, warnings, ownership, or task state.

anti_patterns.title: Controls shift with refreshed content
anti_patterns.do_not: Let primary controls jump when data reloads, panels expand, or adjacent content changes height.
